summary: The user sought assistance in finding budget-friendly alternatives to high-end skincare products and reflected on their shopping habits, particularly regarding luxury items and gourmet groceries. They expressed a desire to make more intentional purchasing decisions and explore budgeting strategies to better manage their expenses.
facts: The user has been using a high-end skincare brand that costs $100 per month but has been receiving duplicates and unsuitable items. The user recently received an annual bonus from work and splurged on a luxury item, questioning its worth. The user purchased a Chanel handbag for $5,000 and has been using it almost daily but is unsure if it was worth the price. The user has been trying to cook more meals at home but has been buying gourmet ingredients from high-end stores. The user is interested in making more intentional purchasing decisions and finding better value for their money. The user is considering budgeting methods such as the 50/30/20 rule, the envelope system, and zero-based budgeting. The user is exploring ways to track expenses, including using spreadsheets, budgeting apps, and a pocket notebook.
